## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## Privacy Impact

- [ ] No change to data flow or privacy pipeline
- [ ] Changes how data is processed — describe below
- [ ] Introduces new data leaving the device — describe below
- [ ] Changes anonymisation, PII detection, or mapping behaviour — describe below

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's [coding standards](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/)
- [ ] Source files include the Apache 2.0 licence header
- [ ] Self-review of the diff completed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No PII, secrets, or API keys in the diff
- [ ] No new GPL dependencies added to core packages
